response.justification: Strong generalist engineer (~14 years) with Staff-level title and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, plus relevant TypeScript/Node.js and AWS CDK experience. However, the resume does not demonstrate the required 8+ years building production AI solutions, omits Python from the skills list, and shows no explicit experience with vector databases, RAG, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph/CrewAI. Customer-facing forward-deployed experience is also not evident.
strengths: Staff-level engineer with MCP and agentic workflow experience at current role
Strong TypeScript/Node.js background and AWS CDK exposure from Optilyz
Long track record of shipping production systems across diverse stacks and data-integration work
concerns: Lacks 8+ years of dedicated production GenAI experience; AI work appears only in last role
Python not listed among skills; no explicit RAG, vector DB, or LangGraph/CrewAI experience
No evident customer-facing forward-deployed or technical-discovery leadership track record

key_factors.factor: Missing Python / RAG / vector DB / multi-agent stack
